backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the e-commerce backend with types for products, orders, carts, wishlists, and reviews, plus CRUD operations and authorization checks using AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping a single Version 1 rebuild/redeploy feature to its associated frontend source files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short descriptions of each frontend file, noting specific bug fixes such as TypeScript error corrections, deprecated class replacements, and route alignment changes made across the codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes covering colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Luxe Store SPA that mounts the React app at the `#root` div and loads the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (home, products, cart, checkout, orders, admin, etc.), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider, and defines the shared Layout with Header and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-page access denied UI component displaying a shield icon, error message, and a link back to the home page for unauthorized admin access attempts.
frontend/src/components/CartItemCard.tsx: Cart item row component that displays product image, name, variant details, a quantity picker, calculated item total with discount, and a remove button.
frontend/src/components/CategoryCard.tsx: Clickable category card with an image, gradient overlay, category name, and product count that navigates to the product listing filtered by category on click.
frontend/src/components/ColorVariantSele: Color swatch selector component that renders circular color buttons mapped from color names to hex values, highlighting the currently selected color.
frontend/src/components/FilterPanel.tsx: A sidebar filter panel component that provides radio group selectors for category and subcategory, plus a price range slider, with an optional close button.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the brand logo, a short description, and navigation links for Shop categories and Account pages.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with logo, desktop nav links, a search form, and action buttons for cart, wishlist, and Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/HeroCarousel.tsx: Auto-advancing image carousel with three luxury-themed slides, navigation arrows, dot indicators, and CTA buttons that route to filtered product pages.
frontend/src/components/OrderManagementT: Admin table listing all orders with columns for ID, items, total, status badge, date, and an inline select to update each order's status.
frontend/src/components/OrderStatusTimel: Visual step-by-step timeline showing order progress through placed, confirmed, shipped, out-for-delivery, and delivered stages, with a special cancelled state.
frontend/src/components/OrderSummary.tsx: Displays a breakdown of an order's subtotal, optional discount, shipping cost, and total in a styled card.
frontend/src/components/PaymentMethodSel: Renders a list of selectable payment method buttons (UPI, Credit Card, Wallet, Cash on Delivery) with icons, highlighting the currently selected method and calling onChange when a new one is picked.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a product card with image, name, price (with discount), wishlist toggle, and add-to-cart button, navigating to the product detail page on click. Includes a skeleton loader variant for loading states.
frontend/src/components/ProductFormModal: A dialog modal with a form for creating or editing a product, pre-populating fields when an existing product is provided and calling addProduct or updateProduct mutations on submit.
frontend/src/components/ProductImageGall: Shows a product's images in a main view with previous/next navigation arrows and a row of clickable thumbnails to switch the displayed image.
frontend/src/components/ProductManagemen: Renders an admin table listing all products with edit and delete actions, and an Add Product button that opens the ProductFormModal for creating or editing entries.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A non-dismissible dialog that collects a new user's name, email, and phone on first login and saves the profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/QuantityPicker.t: A small increment/decrement control for selecting a numeric quantity within configurable min/max bounds, displaying the current value between two buttons.
frontend/src/components/ReviewsList.tsx: Displays a product's reviews list with average star rating, and provides an authenticated form for submitting new reviews using React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/ShippingAddressF: A controlled form component for entering a shipping address with fields for name, address, city, state, ZIP, country, and phone.
frontend/src/components/SizeSelector.tsx: Renders a row of size option buttons, highlighting the currently selected size and calling a callback on selection.
frontend/src/components/SortDropdown.tsx: A dropdown select component for sorting products by newest, price ascending/descending, or best discount.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and persisted identity state across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including products, cart, wishlist, orders, reviews, and user profile CRUD operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global styles using Tailwind with a luxury OKLCH color system (gold, ivory, charcoal palettes), custom design tokens, dark mode variants, and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page with authentication and role checks, rendering tabbed views for product and order management using ProductManagementTable and OrderManagementTable components.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with quantity/remove controls and an order summary, requiring authentication and computing subtotal, discount, shipping, and total.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Multi-step checkout wizard (Shipping → Payment → Review) that collects a shipping address and payment method, computes order totals, and places the order via mutation before navigating to confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page displaying a hero carousel, category cards, featured products grid, and a promo banner, with a profile setup modal triggered for newly authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Order confirmation page that fetches and displays a placed order's details (items, shipping address, payment method, status, and total) after a successful checkout.
frontend/src/pages/OrderHistory.tsx: Order history page listing all user orders sorted by date with status badges, requiring authentication and linking each order to its tracking page at /orders/$orderId.
frontend/src/pages/OrderTracking.tsx: Displays a detailed order tracking page with a visual status timeline, order items, shipping address, and payment method, fetched by orderId route param. Handles unauthenticated, loading, and not-found states.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Shows a single product's details including image gallery, size/color selectors, quantity picker, pricing with discounts, and add-to-cart/wishlist actions. Fetches product data by productId route param.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListing.tsx: Renders a filterable and sortable product grid with a sidebar FilterPanel and mobile sheet drawer, supporting category, subcategory, price range, and sort options. Fetches all products and derives filter options from the data.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: Provides a user profile form for viewing and updating name, email, and phone, with the user's principal ID displayed. Requires authentication and uses query hooks to load and save profile data.
frontend/src/pages/SearchResults.tsx: Displays search results for a keyword query with filtering by category, subcategory, price range, and sorting options. Includes a desktop sidebar and mobile overlay for filters, with empty and no-keyword states handled.
frontend/src/pages/Wishlist.tsx: React page component that displays a user's wishlist, fetching saved products and allowing items to be moved to cart or removed. Handles unauthenticated, loading, and empty states with appropriate UI feedback.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to extract URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a luxury e-commerce theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), CSS-variable-mapped color palettes (gold, charcoal, ivory), border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 9) describing a luxury fashion/lifestyle e-commerce app targeting Android and iOS, listing existing features, architectural notes, and known issues.
